# Classic Mac icon archives — bitmap 32x32 ICN# era

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** S

**Notes:** Bitmap icon pedigree. Already have retro-kare-classic-mac-icons plugin — this adds source-material proof and additional breadth.

**Credits / sources:** Macintosh Repository, Eclectic Light (Howard Oakley), Bumbershoot Software, Apple Fandom Wiki, 99% Invisible.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
